name: snapdeck
description: SnapDeck — turn live web apps into polished, full-bleed PowerPoint training/demo decks.

plugins.name: snapdeck
plugins.description: SnapDeck: build full-bleed PowerPoint decks from a LIVE web app — capture real UI screenshots via headless Chrome (inject session to skip login, force light mode, open modals/tabs, read element coordinates for crisp callouts), render HTML/CSS design slides to PNG, and assemble everything as full-bleed picture slides in a .pptx.
